delegatedBy.description: Tests the programmatic execution of slash commands by an agent.

turns.content:
<objective>
Verify that you can programmatically dispatch another OpenCode slash command using the `execute-slash-command` tool.
</objective>

<process>
1. Call the `execute-slash-command` tool.
2. Set the `command` argument to "test-echo".
3. Set the `arguments` argument to "HELLO FROM THE AGENT".
4. Read the output of the tool execution and report the success back to the user.
</process>

<context>
Investigate these files and write to .hivemind/planning/tools-audit-58-9-2026-06-05/01-tools-surface.md:
- src/tools/delegation/delegate-task.ts: list actions, args, Zod schema
- src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts: list actions, status values used
- src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts: dispatch path
- src/coordination/delegation/coordinator.ts: spawnTmuxPanelForChild
</context>
Tools: execute-slash-command, read, read, read, read
Echo back exactly what the user said: HELLO FROM THE AGENT

`/test-echo HELLO FROM THE AGENT` dispatched successfully to child session `ses_168b8635affe3mj3AhOqxia5H6`.

Now writing the tools surface audit document:

## Kết quả kiểm tra `/test-echo`

Lệnh `/test-echo HELLO FROM THE AGENT` đã dispatch thành công tới child session `ses_168b8635affe3mj3AhOqxia5H6` qua SDK command API. Output trả về là:

> **HELLO FROM THE AGENT**

(Lưu ý: command chạy ở current session context, không phải background subtask — orchestrator vẫn phải tiếp tục thực thi tuần tự.)
